articles.title: Breaking: US and Israel attack Iran, risk aversion to sweep global markets
articles.snippet: Early Saturday, United States (US) President Donald Trump announced that the US had begun “major combat operations” in Iran, following Israel’s pre-emptive missile attacks against Tehran.

articles.title: Dollar Tree, Inc. (DLTR): A Bull Case Theory
Rupee falls 8 paise to settle at 90.99 against US dollar
articles.snippet: The rupee declined 8 paise to settle at 90.99 (provisional) against the US dollar on Friday weighed down by a sharp rise in global crude oil prices amid geopolitical uncertainties.

articles.title: Show HN: Caddy plugin that charges AI crawlers real USDC to access your site
articles.snippet: Hello, I built a Caddy middleware that implements the x402 protocol (by Coinbase) to charge AI crawlers real money for content access.When GPTBot, ClaudeBot, or any known AI crawler hits your site, it gets an HTTP 402 with payment requirements. If it pays (U…
